content: TP-187 remains genuinely blocked at Step 2 after re-auditing the worktree in iteration 3. The prompt-scoped implementation targets (`dashboard/public/index.html`, `dashboard/public/app.js`, `dashboard/public/style.css`, `dashboard/server.cjs`) still do not exist anywhere in this snapshot, and broader searches (`**/dashboard/**`, `**/*dashboard*`, `**/*.html`, `**/*.js`) found no alternate frontend surface. `docs/tutorials/use-the-dashboard.md` is also absent, so there is no safe docs target for Step 4. I updated STATUS.md with the iteration-3 audit details and blocker confirmation. Please restage the missing dashboard sources or amend the prompt to target an existing implementation surface.
